hero.protocol_badge: S1 PROTOCOLS: VLESS REALITY RAW + VLESS REALITY XHTTP | CORE: XRAY-CORE
hero.title: CONTROLLED BETA VPN. POWERED BY VLESS REALITY
hero.subtitle: Controlled Public Beta access with S1-approved transports, evidence-gated regions, manual renewal, and support recovery paths.

features.sectionSubtitle: Six layers of defense engineered for the modern cyber-citizen

stealth.title: Stealth Mode (Reality)
stealth.desc: VLESS Reality is the S1 default path for networks where standard VPN fingerprints are unreliable. Availability depends on real node evidence.

backbone.title: Backbone Performance
backbone.desc: Startup regions are enabled only after Remnawave node evidence, monitoring, support recovery, and rollback proof are available.

ram.title: Privacy-Bounded Operations
ram.desc: Public privacy wording is limited to what S1 evidence can support. Operational metadata may exist for security, billing, support, and provisioning.

routing.title: Intelligent Routing
routing.desc: Region visibility is evidence-gated: a location is shown only when node health, profile mapping, and support handling are ready.

multiplatform.title: Native Multi-Platform
multiplatform.desc: S1 supports web cabinet, Telegram Bot/Mini App, and standard third-party client import instructions for Android, iOS, Windows, macOS, and Linux.

protocols.title: Advanced Protocols
protocols.desc: S1 exposes VLESS Reality RAW as default and VLESS Reality XHTTP as the alternate path. Other transports stay out of scope until separately approved.

how_it_works.title: How Reality Works
how_it_works.desc: Reality-based profiles are configured to resemble ordinary HTTPS flows while keeping the rollout evidence-driven. XHTTP is treated as the S1 alternate path, not as a universal bypass promise.

ip_blocking.cybervpn: Lower when node evidence is current

privacy.cybervpn: Bounded privacy claims tied to evidence

quick_start.title: 30-Second Path
quick_start.step3: Import QR, subscription URL, or config into a supported client
quick_start.terminalStatus: > VPN access ready when provisioning evidence and support recovery pass.

network_stats.title: Network Infrastructure
network_stats.uptime: Monitoring and alerts required before go-live

tech_specs.network: Network: S1 startup regions, monitored node evidence

speed_tunnel.subtitle: S1 startup regions. Evidence-gated nodes. Fair-use policy.
